zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnès de Coucy-Vervins於大約1226年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯艾斯維文斯時，她的父親Thomas II de Coucy-Vervins44歲，母親Mahaut DE RETHEL VITRY36歲。她於1260年之前與Jean TAUPIN de SOMMEVESLE ou d'ESCANNEVELLE在艾歐洛結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1277年享年52歲，埋葬在法國德 艾斯特姆斯維爾頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnès de Coucy-Vervins于大约1226年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯艾斯維文斯时，她的父亲Thomas II de Coucy-Vervins44岁，母亲Mahaut DE RETHEL VITRY36岁。她于1260年之前与Jean TAUPIN de SOMMEVESLE ou d'ESCANNEVELLE在艾歐洛结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1277年享年52岁，埋葬在法国德 艾斯特姆斯維爾頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Agnès
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnès de Coucy-Vervins was born about 1226, in Vervins, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, France, her father, Thomas II de Coucy-Vervins, was 44 and her mother, Mahaut DE RETHEL VITRY, was 36. She married Jean TAUPIN de SOMMEVESLE ou d'ESCANNEVELLE before 1260, in Europe. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1277, at the age of 52, and was buried in Verdun, Meuse, Grand Est, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnès de Coucy-Vervins est née environ 1226, à Vervins, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Thomas II de Coucy-Vervins, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Mahaut DE RETHEL VITRY, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Jean TAUPIN de SOMMEVESLE ou d'ESCANNEVELLE avant 1260, à Europe. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1277, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterrée à Verdun, Meuse, Grand Est, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnès de Coucy-Vervins um 1226 in Vervins, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas II de Coucy-Vervins 44 und ihre Mutter Mahaut DE RETHEL VITRY 36. Sie hat vor 1260 in Europa Jean TAUPIN de SOMMEVESLE ou d'ESCANNEVELLE geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1277 im Alter von 52 Jahren und wurde in Verdun, Meuse, Großer Osten, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnès de Coucy-Vervins è nata il circa 1226 nel Vervins, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Francia, sua padre, Thomas II de Coucy-Vervins, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Mahaut DE RETHEL VITRY, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Jean TAUPIN de SOMMEVESLE ou d'ESCANNEVELLE prima del 1260, nel Europa. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1277, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolta a Verdun, Meuse, Grand Est, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnès de Coucy-Vervinsが約1226年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスエイスンバーヴィンスで生まれた時，父Thomas II de Coucy-Vervinsは44歳，母Mahaut DE RETHEL VITRYは36歳であった。1260年以前にヨーロッパでJean TAUPIN de SOMMEVESLE ou d'ESCANNEVELLEと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1277年に52歳で死去し，フランスグランド エストメウゼバーダンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnès de Coucy-Vervins(이)가 대략 1226년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 아이스니 베르빈스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas II de Coucy-Vervins(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mahaut DE RETHEL VITRY(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1260년 이전 우럽에서 Jean TAUPIN de SOMMEVESLE ou d'ESCANNEVELLE(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1277년 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 우스 베르던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnès de Coucy-Vervins nasceu aproximadamente 1226, em Vervins, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Thomas II de Coucy-Vervins, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Mahaut DE RETHEL VITRY, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Jean TAUPIN de SOMMEVESLE ou d'ESCANNEVELLE antes 1260, em Europa. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1277, com 52 anos, e foi sepultada em Verdun, Meuse, Grand Est, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnès de Coucy-Vervins родилась около 1226 г. в местности вирвинс, эисн, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Thomas II de Coucy-Vervins было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Mahaut DE RETHEL VITRY, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jean TAUPIN de SOMMEVESLE ou d'ESCANNEVELLE перед 1260 г. в местности Европа. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1277 г. в возрасте 52 лет и была похоронена в местности вирдун, меус, гранд эст, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnès de Coucy-Vervins nació aproximadamente 1226, en Vervins, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Thomas II de Coucy-Vervins, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Mahaut DE RETHEL VITRY, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Jean TAUPIN de SOMMEVESLE ou d'ESCANNEVELLE antes de 1260, en Europa. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1277, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultada en Verdun, Meuse, Grand Est, Francia.
